page_content:
### 5. Dr. Vijay Vaidyanathan (The Department Head)  
**Subject:** Medical School Application & Update: Arian Moridani  
Hi Dr. Vaidyanathan,  
I hope you’re doing well! I often think back to your courses and how you emphasized real-world impact over just theory.  
I wanted to share an update: while I considered a PhD at UNT, I chose an **M.S. in Computer Science** at **Georgia Tech** to master AI and big data solutions for healthcare. Your mentorship, especially in understanding how engineering applies beyond the lab, really shaped my vision for this path.  
I’d really value your support on this medical school application. To make things easy, I’ve set up an **Interfolio** account for a single upload. **I have a target deadline of May 15th for my materials.**  
I’ve attached my updated CV and documents showing how I'm applying these skills in **Big Data for Health** and **Computer Vision**. Thanks again for being such a strong voice in my journey.  
Warmly,  
Arian Moridani  
---
